caption: A man with short brown hair wearing a red t-shirt stands against a split-color background of light blue on top and lime green on the bottom. His shirt features a white logo that reads "Learning in Hand" with a graphic of a hand and the smaller text "with TONY VINCENT" below it. To his left, a circular logo for the "Great Plains SUMMIT" displays a yellow sun and the text "2022" and "July 14–15, 2022". The man speaks to the camera, his facial expressions shifting from a wide smile to a more neutral, attentive look. He gestures with his hands throughout the sequence, moving them from his sides toward his midsection. The setting and the on-screen text remain static across the sequence, while the man's physical movements and expressions evolve as he delivers his message.
